name: zendesk-support
description: Reads and writes allow-listed Zendesk Support resources through the Zendesk Support REST API v2; Pass B expands top-level read streams from the public Airbyte/Zendesk surface.

risk.read: external Zendesk Support API read across tickets, users, organizations, groups, satisfaction ratings, admin metadata, business rules, and Guide/community top-level resources
risk.write: allow-listed Zendesk Support mutations for tickets, users, organizations, groups, macros, triggers, automations, views, and ticket fields; destructive deletes require approval
risk.approval: writes require reverse-ETL approval; reads require normal connector access
